title: 10 best herbal teas for chickenpox
description: St John's wort teas helps with chickenpox because it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties that can alleviate symptoms such as fever, redness, and itching associated with the disease. The herbal tea may also help soothe the skin by reducing irritation and promoting healing. Additionally, St John's wort has antiviral compounds that may help combat the virus that causes chickenpox, allowing the body to recover faster.
